case_title: LEMUS PEDRO A. et al VS KASTRO BROTHERS DAVID & JOSE DBA KASTRO TRANSPORTE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $365.00 FILED BY LEMUS PEDRO A. ALONZO BLANCA AS TO DEFENDANT KASTRO BROTHERS DAVID & JOSE DBA KASTRO TRANSPORTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. LETTER TO KASTRO BROTHERS RETURNED UNCLAIMED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-23-1993, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-05-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KASTRO BROTHERS DAVID & JOSE DBA KASTRO TRANSPORTE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEMUS PEDRO A. ALONZO BLANCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KASTRO BROTHERS DAVID & JOSE DBA KASTRO TRANSPORTE $465.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $505.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KASTRO BROTHERS DAVID & JOSE DBA KASTRO TRANSPORTE HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-18-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-05-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEMUS PEDRO A. ALONZO BLANCA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KASTRO BROTHERS DAVID & JOSE DBA KASTRO TRANSPORTE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JAUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.
